data.title: Eatsbueno Announces Integrated AI-Driven Corporate Wellness Platform Designed for Global Enterprise Performance
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Houston, Eatsbueno revealed progress in enhancing its AI-powered corporate wellness platform. This move solidifies the U.S. company’s stance in the tech, human behavior, and global strategy sectors. With organizations globally...

data.title: New Research from WiCyS and FourOne Insights Reveals Skills-Based Cyber Talent Practices Can Deliver Over $125,000 in ROI Per Employee
data.description: A recent collaborative study reveals that mentorship programs, skills-based promotions, and collaborations with third-party entities significantly enhance retention rates, speed up hiring processes, and advance gender diversity in the cybersecurity industry. The report, released in Cookeville, Tennessee on March 12, 2026, highlighted the positive impact of these strategies on the field. The findings underscore that investing in mentorship, promoting based on skills, and forming partnerships can lead to tangible improvements, particularly for women, in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: Alexander & Baldwin is Taken Private in $2.3 Billion Transaction
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Alexander & Baldwin (A&B), a Hawaii-based company specializing in commercial real estate in Hawaii, revealed a partnership with a joint venture led by MW Group affiliate and affiliated funds. This collaboration signifies a significant move for A&B in expanding its real estate ventures in Hawaii.

data.title: Canary Technologies Introduces F&B Mobile Ordering to Boost Hotel Revenue
data.description: Canary Technologies, a global leader in hotel guest management technology, recently introduced a mobile-first ordering solution called F&B Mobile Ordering. The new solution has proven to boost F&B revenue by an impressive 30% for hotels. This innovation also streamlines hotel workflows by automating certain processes. On March 12, 2026, in San Francisco, the company made the official announcement. This advancement showcases the commitment of Canary Technologies to revolutionize the hospitality industry by leveraging technology to drive efficiency and profitability.

data.title: Bridging the Skills Gap with Digital Badges: University of Phoenix's Emphasis on Employer-Driven Learning
data.description: The University of Phoenix reached a significant milestone by awarding its one millionth digital badge, underscoring its focus on a curriculum that aligns with skills and a credentialing system that prioritizes learners. The university's learner-first approach is geared towards aiding adults in showcasing their verified capabilities to potential employers. This achievement showcases the institution's dedication to providing valuable credentials to its students. The announcement was made in Phoenix on March 12, 2026.
U.S. CRUDE FUTURES HAVE CLIMBED $2 TO $97.73 PER BARREL.

data.title: MiroMind Announces Three World-Class Scientific Leaders to Join Its Core AI Research Team
data.description: MiroMind, a company based in Redwood City, California, has recently appointed three prominent scientists to its leadership team. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's Heavy Duty Solver Engine in areas such as reasoning, runtime, and verifiable AI. The announcement was made on March 12, 2026, showcasing MiroMind's commitment to innovation and expertise in the field. With these new additions, the company is poised to strengthen its position in the market and drive further advancements in AI technology.
U.S. SECRETARY OF STATE MARCO RUBIO WILL JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP ON HIS TRIP TO CHINA, DESPITE PREVIOUSLY MISSING OPPORTUNITIES TO PARTICIPATE, ACCORDING TO THE SOUTH CHINA MORNING POST

data.title: New AI tool by Google predicts flash floods 24 hours early, covers 150 countries with Gemini-powered Groundsource AI.
data.description: A new AI system called Groundsource, powered by Gemini technology from Google, is utilizing decades worth of news reports to provide real-time flash flood warnings in 150 countries. This system is set up to quickly analyze and process information to help alert individuals and communities about potential dangers. It is an advanced tool that aims to enhance the preparedness and response to such natural disasters globally.

data.title: Aptar Pharma and COVIRIX Medical Partner to Develop Inhalable Antiviral Treatments
data.description: In Crystal Lake, Illinois, a collaboration has been established between Aptar Pharma and COVIRIX Medical to explore the possibility of modifying Aptar Pharma's unique DPI platform for the delivery of antiviral medications.

U.S. OFFICIALS REPORT THAT IRAN IS LAYING MINES IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ, ACCORDING TO THE NEW YORK TIMES. THIS CONTRADICTS EARLIER REMARKS BY TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT WHO STATED IRAN HAD NOT MINED THE STRAIT.
SOUTH KOREAN PM KIM'S OFFICE STATED THAT U.S. VICE PRESIDENT VANCE HAS WELCOMED A U.S. INVESTMENT BILL, ACCORDING TO YONHAP.
RIO TINTO HAS SUSPENDED ALL MINING OPERATIONS AT ITS KENNECOTT FACILITY.

data.title: Conifex Provides Corporate Update
data.description: Vancouver, BC - Today, Conifex Timber Inc. (TSX: CFF) disclosed a change in the timing of their fourth quarter 2025 results announcement. The update states that the results will now be released before the market opens on March 23, 2026. Subsequently, the earnings call has been rescheduled to take place at 8:00 AM PT / 11:00 AM ET on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. For those interested in participating in the call, the provided number should be dialed at the designated time.

data.title: Aebi Schmidt Group to release Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings on March 19, 2026
data.description: Aebi Schmidt Group, a leading specialty vehicles company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AEBI, is set to release its financial results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2025. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, March 19, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, the Company will conduct an earnings conference call and webcast at 8:30 am Eastern Time on the same day. This event will provide insights into the Company's performance during the stated periods, attracting the attention of investors and stakeholders.
JAPAN IS SET TO JOIN THE U.S. MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM, WITH THE ANNOUNCEMENT EXPECTED AT AN UPCOMING SUMMIT, ACCORDING TO YOMIURI.

data.title: Trump sets policy without legislation by suing GOP states, reversing old cases. Using courts for fast-track policy changes.
data.description: The Trump administration has been utilizing legal action against Republican states and implementing significant policy changes through rapid reversals in previous cases. This strategy involves leveraging the court system to expedite these shifts, showcasing a proactive approach to reforming policies.

data.title: IBM unveils plan to integrate quantum processors into supercomputing centers for advanced drug discovery simulations.
data.description: IBM has released a reference architecture that allows for the integration of quantum processors into current supercomputing centers. This advancement will enable molecular simulations that surpass the capabilities of traditional computing. By combining quantum and classical computing systems, researchers can push the boundaries of scientific exploration. This breakthrough signifies a major step forward in harnessing the power of quantum technology for practical applications.

data.title: IBM introduces groundbreaking quantum-centric supercomputing blueprint, integrating QPU with HPC infrastructure. #innovation #technology
data.description: IBM has introduced a pioneering reference architecture for quantum-centric supercomputing, facilitating the integration of Quantum Processing Units (QPUs) with current High-Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructure and classical accelerators. This development marks a breakthrough in the industry as it allows for enhanced computational capabilities. The inclusion of QPUs alongside classical accelerators is a significant advancement in supercomputing technology, with implications for various industries seeking to leverage quantum computing power. This initiative represents IBM's commitment to advancing quantum computing and expanding its applications in the realm of supercomputing.
